hero.title: Silky, Smooth, Healthy Hair — Effortlessly
hero.subtitle: Professional keratin, nanoplasty, and restorative treatments tailored to your hair type. Designed to smooth, repair, and enhance natural shine while preserving the strength and health of your hair.

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.text: I specialize in advanced hair care treatments that restore structure, eliminate frizz, and bring back natural shine. Every treatment is carefully selected based on your hair type, condition, and desired result. My goal is not just a temporary effect, but long-lasting, healthy, and manageable hair that looks and feels beautiful every day. I use only high-quality Formaldehydfree Premium-Products and techniques that are safe, effective, and proven.
welcome.subtext: --My approach is based on precision and care. Each client receives personalized recommendations for both salon treatments and home care. This ensures that your results last longer and your hair remains strong, smooth, and radiant between visits--

treatments.title: Hair care after treatment
treatments.subtitle: Proper aftercare is essential to maintain the results of your treatment. Follow these simple but important steps to keep your hair smooth, shiny, and healthy for as long as possible.

items.title: Hair Washing
items.text: Choose a shampoo that suits your scalp type, preferably from professional lines. Apply shampoo only to the roots and gently massage the scalp without aggressively rubbing the hair length. Let the foam cleanse the rest of the hair naturally.

items.title: Conditioner
items.text: After washing, gently squeeze out excess water and apply conditioner to the mid-lengths and ends. Avoid the roots. Distribute evenly with your fingers or a comb, leave for a few minutes, then rinse thoroughly.

items.title: After Washing
items.text: Do not keep your hair wrapped in a towel for too long. Avoid rubbing — instead, gently press the towel to absorb moisture and reduce damage to the hair structure.

items.title: Blow-drying
items.text: Always dry your hair using a hairdryer. Apply heat protection before drying. Direct airflow from roots to ends to enhance smoothness and shine. For thick hair, divide it into sections for better control.

items.title: Important
items.text: The longevity of your results depends directly on your home care routine. Consistent and proper care keeps your hair smooth, glossy, and well-maintained for months. If you are unsure about products — feel free to ask for advice.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A professional approach to hair care built on experience, precision, and attention to detail.
about.text: I specialize in modern hair restoration and smoothing techniques, focusing on achieving natural, healthy results rather than temporary effects. Every client is unique, which is why I carefully assess hair condition, structure, and goals before selecting the right treatment. My work is based on high standards, continuous learning, and the use of professional products that deliver visible and lasting results. I believe that beautiful hair starts with proper care, and my mission is to help you achieve confidence in your look every day.
about.subtext: — Individual approach. Visible results. Healthy hair —

items.question: How long does the result last?
items.answer: Depending on hair type and home care, the result lasts from 2 to 6 months. Proper aftercare significantly extends the effect.

items.question: Can I wash my hair immediately after the procedure?
items.answer: Yes, modern formulations allow washing your hair the same day. However, it is important to follow individual post-treatment recommendations.

items.question: Can the treatment be done on bleached, colored hair or balayage?
items.answer: Yes, it is suitable. I work with all hair types, including blonde, highlights, balayage, and airtouch.

items.question: Do your products contain formaldehyde?
items.answer: No. All products have European quality certifications and do not contain formaldehyde.

items.question: Can pregnant women and children have the treatment?
items.answer: Nanoplasty can be done for children and pregnant women. Other procedures are decided individually after consultation.

items.question: Will the procedure damage my hair?
items.answer: No. When performed correctly and with proper aftercare, hair becomes smoother, shinier, and healthier.

items.question: Will I lose all volume?
items.answer: No. If needed, root volume can be preserved for a more natural result.
